response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer, but the resume shows almost no alignment with this role's mandatory requirements. Professional C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 (plus a university thesis project), far short of the required 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience (only MySQL/MongoDB/generic SQL) and no fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain exposure. The core stack (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang) is unrelated to the position.
strengths: Deep, broad software engineering experience across many stacks
Some genuine C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and in personal projects
concerns: Only ~6 months professional C++ vs. required 5–10 years on Windows
No SQL Server/Oracle and no fixed-income/capital-markets domain experience
Current career gap and primary stack unrelated to the role
